data.body:
[Event Notice]

It looks like there are students in need all over the stadium!
Check out the unique episodes with students and receive Eleph of Hasumi (Track), 10-Recruitment Ticket and other gifts also!

🗓️Event Period: 4/25 (Tue) After Maintenance - 5/16 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)![m13S60ajgYoAIDaxgEOl4yJka6OdsThr.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/m13S60ajgYoAIDaxgEOl4yJka6OdsThr.jpg)
